NAME: ELSA-Brasil
DESCRIPTION: Brazilian Longitudinal Study of Adult Health: six centers with deep phenotyping and biosamples; genome-wide data used for cardiometabolic and population-genetics GWAS in Brazil.
MANUAL_CITATION: Schmidt, M. I., Duncan, B. B., Mill, J. G., Lotufo, P. A., Chor, D., Barreto, S. M., ... & Bensenor, I. M. (2015). Cohort Profile: Longitudinal Study of Adult Health (ELSA-Brasil). International Journal of Epidemiology, 44(1), 68-75.
PARTICIPANTS: Brazilian civil servants and families (longitudinal aging)
